---
title: "Regression"
title-slide-attributes:
    data-background-image: /regression_files/chalkboard.png
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    show-slide-number: all
    chalkboard: true
    multiplex: true
    html:
       page-layout: full
       
---

## Objective

```{=html}
<style type="text/css">

body, td {
   font-size: 14px;
}
code.r{
  font-size: 30px;
}
pre {
  font-size: 20px
}
</style>
```

-   learn regression modeling
-   tackle a common question in study design

. . .

I want to learn about the effect of this.
<br>
How many samples do I need?
